name: Stage Blinder FLEX Blaze

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F7B08C8B-3843-11EF-887D-525400685065

comment:
Stage Blinder FLEX Blaze is a set of 8 high-power LED audience blinders of 100 W each and a dedicated controller. Each individual pod has a powerful warm white COB LED of 3000 K with integrated amber LEDs to perfectly mimic the tungsten dimming of traditional blinders. Integrated RGB LEDs light sources allow you to create unique full-colour blaze effects. The powerful LED light source combined with a strobe functionality allows you to use the Stage Blinder FLEX Blaze as a strobe light with interesting colour effects. The light effect can be controlled via DMX/RDM, Master/Slave, but can also run in stand-alone mode with several built-in programs.

The blinder pods have a special mounting bracket with 4 holes at a 45-degree angle, so you don’t have to detach the pod from it to drill through the holes to mount it. The bracket also has a 12.5 mm hole, while the controller has two 12.5 mm holes and an M10 threaded insert for attaching a clamp. You can also attach a quick lock bracket to the controller and pods. The blinders and controller have a robust IP65-rated aluminium enclosure and are ready for outdoor shows. Dedicated 4x 2.5 m and 4x 5 m cables with control signals and power are included. Additional dedicated cables of various lengths are available separately (maximum length allowed: 30 m).

capabilities.comment: Ramp Up Off < High 0-20Hz - Strobe Pulse Open
Ramp Down  Off > High 0-20Hz - Strobe Pulse Closed
All LEDs Strobe Random 0-20Hz - Strobe Random
Sectoral LEDs Strobe Random 0-20Hz - Strobe Random
Ramp Up Off < High 0-20Hz - Strobe Pulse Open
Ramp Down  Off > High 0-20Hz - Strobe Pulse Closed
All LEDs Strobe Random 0-20Hz - Strobe Random
Sectoral LEDs Strobe Random 0-20Hz - Strobe Random
